ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title_year" TEXT /* Title of the movie with release year */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie (e.g., Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi) */,
  "averagerating" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "numvotes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "production_budget" INTEGER /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "domestic_gross" INTEGER /* Domestic gross revenue of the movie */,
  "worldwide_gross" INTEGER /* Worldwide gross revenue of the movie */,
  "gross_less_budget" INTEGER /* Gross revenue less production budget */,
  "made_money" INTEGER /* Whether the movie made money */,
  "lost_money" INTEGER /* Whether the movie lost money */,
  "marketing_budget" INTEGER /* Marketing budget of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_gross" INTEGER /* Gross revenue during the opening weekend */,
  "profit_margin" TEXT /* Profit margin as a percentage */,
  "return_on_investment" TEXT /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of release */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of release (e.g., a-Spring, b-Summer) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of release */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., theatrical, digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "is_subscriber" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a subscriber */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Whether the review contains a spoiler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was watched */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the movie was watched (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., smartphone, tablet, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_crew" (
  "cast_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast/crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast/crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast/crew member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played (if applicable) */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Whether the cast member is a lead actor */,
  "is_main_crew" INTEGER /* Whether the crew member is a main crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)
